user.title: Health Auto Export
user.description: Add one integration per data type. In the app, create a separate automation for each type and point it to this instance's webhook URL (shown on the created device).

abort.all_configured: Every data type is already configured.
abort.already_configured: This data type is already configured.

init.title: Medication merges
init.description: Merge duplicate medications into one. Doses of the source are counted under the target (device, records and statistics).

data_description.source: Pick from known medications or type a name.
data_description.target: Where the source's doses should be counted.

abort.no_options: This data type has no options.
